title: Squirrel Removal in Chelsea, Manhattan | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Chelsea, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Serving Chelsea homes and businesses. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Chelsea property? Our expert squirrel removal services protect Manhattan homes and businesses from unwanted wildlife intrusions. We provide humane, effective squirrel extraction and prevention services throughout the Chelsea neighborhood, ensuring your property remains safe and squirrel-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Chelsea, with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges of Manhattan's urban squirrel populations. We offer same-day emergency services, humane removal methods, and comprehensive exclusion work with warranties that give Chelsea residents lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Chelsea's mix of historic brownstones, modern high-rises, and pre-war buildings along tree-lined streets creates ideal entry points for squirrels seeking shelter. From properties near the High Line to apartments along Eighth Avenue, our team knows the architectural vulnerabilities common in Chelsea structures and provides tailored solutions for this vibrant West Side neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Chelsea?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Chelsea typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Chelsea buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Chelsea due to the neighborhood's mature trees, proximity to parks, and older buildings with accessible rooflines and vents. Both gray squirrels and the occasional flying squirrel find Chelsea's architecture ideal for nesting, especially in attics and wall voids.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Chelsea property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Chelsea residents. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 2-5 days, including trapping, extraction, and sealing entry points. Emergency situations involving squirrels in living spaces receive priority response.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane squirrel removal in Chelsea?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-capture methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely relocated, and we focus on exclusion techniques to prevent re-entry, ensuring a permanent, ethical solution for your Chelsea property.
